notes: Collection ad includes a cover image or video followed by 3 product images. When tapped, opens an Instant Experience (required). Image max file size: 30MB. Video max file size: 4GB. Available placements also include Facebook video feeds, Facebook Reels, Facebook Marketplace, Instagram Feed, Instagram Stories, Instagram Reels, and Instagram Explore. Primary text limit of 125 characters and headline limit of 40 characters are recommendations, not hard limits.
